description: Renders a measurement indicator with text label between two 3D points
utility: Show a labeled measurement line in 3D space with optional label offset

arguments.name: start_x
arguments.description: X coordinate of the start point

arguments.name: start_y
arguments.description: Y coordinate of the start point

arguments.name: start_z
arguments.description: Z coordinate of the start point

arguments.name: end_x
arguments.description: X coordinate of the end point

arguments.name: end_y
arguments.description: Y coordinate of the end point

arguments.name: end_z
arguments.description: Z coordinate of the end point

alternates.description: Use point3d expressions instead of separate coordinates
perpBuff = perpendicular distance of measurement line from shape, labelBuff = additional perpendicular offset for label
Perpendicular offset only, no extra label offset

examples.scenario: measurement using point3d with label offset
